setup.note: Register an OAuth client (Github app or OAuth app), then enter its client ID and client secret. FlexiGPT performs the OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant on your behalf and stores the credentials in the OS secret store.

inputs.label: GitHub OAuth Client Credentials
inputs.description: Client ID and client secret used for the client_credentials grant.
inputs.note: Stored as a secret and never shown again. Leave blank to keep the existing credentials.
